title: OpenAI sued over ChatGPT health advice that almost killed a pastor - Engadget
summary: It allegedly offered "extremely dangerous medical recommendations" regarding a pulmonary embolism. However, the company wants users to upload health records to ChatGPT Health to foster a discussion with the bot.
